_note: PR #31 year-pivot gap taxonomy refinement. Five anonymized synthetic fixtures exercise (a) renamed PR #26 path → year_pivot_forecast_only_no_revision, (b) explicit 기존(26E)/변경(26E) revision panel embedded under a year-pivot table → parsed_metric_pair (operating_profit primary, direction=up), (c) year-pivot + 영업이익률(%)/순이익률(%)/EPS 성장률(YoY) rows + 목표주가 keyword → year_pivot_has_metric_headers_no_old_new, (d) year-pivot + 수정/변경 prose phrases near the pivot table → year_pivot_positional_revision_candidate, (e) year-pivot consisting entirely of margin/YoY rows → year_pivot_has_metric_headers_no_old_new (no primary metric extractable). Forbidden actions: zero PDFs/extracted texts/output JSON committed; values are illustrative.
